title: SQL alert task in Lakeflow Jobs is now generally available ​
body:
**June 29, 2026**

The SQL alert task in Lakeflow Jobs is now generally available. Use the task to evaluate a Databricks SQL alert as part of a Lakeflow Job. The task returns its evaluation state as a task output value, so downstream tasks can branch on the result. See [SQL alert task for jobs](/aws/en/jobs/tasks/alert).
